name: Chicken and Fruit Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chicken with salt.
2. Grind the peppercorns, clove, and cinnamon together in a spice mill and mix with the sugar, sherry, garlic, vinegar, and 1½ teaspoons of salt.
3. Spread one-third of the onion in the bottom of the crockpot. Cover with one-third each of the tomatoes, chicken, and fruit.
4. Add the bay leaves and sprinkle some of the seasonings over the mixture. Pour on half the vinegar-spice mixture.
5. Repeat the layers, finishing with a topping of onion, tomatoes, and fruit. Cover and cook for about 1 hour.
6. Uncover and cook for an additional 30 minutes, or until the chicken is tender and some juices have been reduced.
7. Discard bay leaves.
FOR THE GARNISH:
1. Heat oil in a pan and fry plantain slices until deep golden brown. Remove and drain.
2. To serve, cover the top of the stew with capers, olives, and fried plantain.
